signals.headline: Oil Market Impacts Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Oil Market Impacts Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
North Sea oil prices have hit record highs due to Iran's control of the Strait of Hormuz, with predictions of potential $3 gas prices for summer as peak demand begins.[3][4] Investors warn the conflict will leave "scar tissue" in global markets with commodity prices unlikely to return to pre-conflict levels quickly.[3]
